closed_world.quote: I was already in my seat at the front, close to the teacher's desk.

investigator.value: Daniel Reayn, a student who notices something suspicious about the new girl's identity
investigator.quote: I knew something was wrong. This girl...she looked oddly familiar. She looked like...Cree.

suspect_architecture.value: School social hierarchy with multiple potential suspects: Alexandria (creepy outsider), Amber (antagonistic popular girl who owes money), mysterious new 'Cree' with hidden past, real Cree with unexplained absence
suspect_architecture.quote: Alexandria, the creepiest girl I've ever met, made her way to her usual spot in the back

red_herring.value: Identity confusion between real Cree and impostor - the new girl claiming to be Cree creates deliberate misdirection about who is missing and why
red_herring.quote: This girl was definitely not Cree. She was too salacious, and she had a daughter. Cree was still a virgin.

clue_fairness.value: Physical appearance discrepancy presented to reader simultaneously with narrator's observation - both see the visual similarity but behavioral differences
clue_fairness.quote: She looked like...Cree. Cree looked exactly like her, but she didn't dress so brazen.

social_world.value: High school hierarchy with popularity-based power structure: Amber as popular tormentor, Daniel as victim, financial debts creating obligation networks
social_world.quote: she's the most popular girl in school. She's beautiful, confident, and witty

alibi.value: Cree's claimed alibi of 'meeting with another teacher' for her lateness, which becomes suspicious when impostor appears
alibi.quote: Sorry,' she panted. 'I had a meeting with another teacher.' she explained to Mrs. Gomez.

investigator_wound.value: Daniel's romantic obsession and past embarrassment with Cree creates emotional vulnerability that compromises his judgment about the identity switch
investigator_wound.quote: we havn't spoken since seventh grade, since I completely embarassed her on accident

_meta.title: ebook redhead16 marisa to love a pretty girl
